To properly structure the web page's metadata and ensure that the topic of the article is clear, here are the JSON-LD and meta tags formatted according to the information you provided:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Future of Computer Graphics - ArtCabbage</title>

    <!-- Meta Tags -->
    <meta name="description" content="Explore the exciting future of computer graphics (CG), from real-time ray tracing to AI integration, and learn how technology is transforming visual storytelling.">
    <meta name="author" content="ArtCabbage">
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="ArtCabbage">
    <meta property="fb:app_id" content="195655606875833">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Future of Computer Graphics - ArtCabbage">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Discover the advancements in computer graphics and their applications in real-time ray tracing, AI, VR, and more.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://artcabbage.com/articles/future-cg.jpg">
    <meta property="og:type" content="article">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://artcabbage.com/articles/future-of-computer-graphics">

    <!-- Twitter Card -->
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Future of Computer Graphics - ArtCabbage">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Explore the future of computer graphics and the technological advancements changing digital storytelling.">
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://artcabbage.com/articles/future-cg.jpg">

    <!-- LD+JSON Structured Data -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Article",
      "mainEntityOfPage": {
        "@type": "WebPage",
        "@id": "https://artcabbage.com/articles/future-of-computer-graphics"
      },
      "headline": "The Future of Computer Graphics",
      "description": "Explore the advancements in computer graphics with insights into real-time ray tracing,
